PGNInfo.Description: Maretron: Slave Response - Deviation Calibration Status
PGNInfo.Explanation: This indicates the status of the deviation calibration process.

PGNInfo.Description: Maretron: Slave Response - Get Variation Configuration
Maretron: Slave Response - Get Rate of Turn Configuration
Maretron: Slave Response - Set Rate of Turn Configuration
Maretron: Slave Response - Get Installation Configuration

PGNInfo.Explanation: A slave response that hasn't yet been reverse engineered.

PGNInfo.Description: NMEA - Command group function - Maretron Proprietary Reset
PGNInfo.Explanation: This will initiate a reset and force the SSC300 to start the calibration process.

Field.Name: Number of Parameters
Field.Description: How many parameter pairs will follow

PGNInfo.Description: NMEA - Command group function - Maretron Proprietary Start Rate of Turn Zeroing
PGNInfo.Explanation: This command causes the SSC300 to zero the rate of turn indication and record the compensation value used, along with the current operating temperature of the compass. The boat must remain at rest for a period of one minute after this command is issued.

Field.Name: Number of Parameters
Field.Description: How many parameter pairs will follow

PGNInfo.Description: NMEA - Command group function - Maretron Proprietary Cancel Rate of Turn Zeroing
PGNInfo.Explanation: This command causes the SSC300 to cancel any rate of turn zeroing operations currently in progress.

Field.Name: Number of Parameters
Field.Description: How many parameter pairs will follow

PGNInfo.Description: NMEA - Command group function - Maretron Proprietary Get Rate of Turn Damping
PGNInfo.Explanation: This command causes the SSC300 to send its configured rate of turn damping period in .

Field.Name: Number of Parameters
Field.Description: How many parameter pairs will follow

PGNInfo.Description: NMEA - Command group function - Maretron Proprietary Set Rate of Turn Damping
PGNInfo.Explanation: This command causes the SSC300 to use a rate of turn damping rate corresponding to the value programmed in "damping period". The damping period is programmable from 100 to 60000, which represents 100ms to 60 seconds.

Field.Name: Number of Parameters
Field.Description: How many parameter pairs will follow

PGNInfo.Description: NMEA - Command group function - Maretron Proprietary Get Installation Configuration

Field.Name: Number of Parameters
Field.Description: How many parameter pairs will follow

PGNInfo.Description: NMEA - Command group function - Maretron Proprietary Start Rate of Turn Zeroing
PGNInfo.Explanation: This command causes the SSC300 to zero the rate of turn indication and record the compensation value used, along with the current operating temperature of the compass. The boat must remain at rest for a period of one minute after this command is issued.

Field.Name: Number of Parameters
Field.Description: How many parameter pairs will follow

PGNInfo.Description: NMEA - Command group function - Maretron Proprietary Resend Calibration Status
PGNInfo.Explanation: This will cause the SSC300 to resend the last deviation calibration status message.

Field.Name: Number of Parameters
Field.Description: How many parameter pairs will follow

PGNInfo.Description: NMEA - Command group function - Maretron Proprietary Set Variation Source

Field.Name: Number of Parameters
Field.Description: How many parameter pairs will follow

PGNInfo.Description: NMEA - Command group function - Maretron Proprietary Installation Offset
PGNInfo.Explanation: This PGN performs the installation offset of the compass. It sets the roll and pitch outputs to zero at the compass’ current orientation and sets the heading reading for the current orientation to the value given by the PGN

Field.Name: Number of Parameters
Field.Description: How many parameter pairs will follow

PGNInfo.Description: NMEA - Command group function - Unknown Maretron Proprietary Command
PGNInfo.Explanation: A Maretron command that hasn't yet been reverse engineered.

Field.Name: Number of Parameters
Field.Description: How many parameter pairs will follow
